title: configuration_recorder
description: One configuration change recorder or config management service — AWS Config recorder, GCP Config Connector, Azure Policy assignment. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for recording-status and coverage checks.

id.description: Unique stable identifier (Config: recorder ARN or name).

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

is_recording.description: Recorder is actively recording resource changes.

all_resource_types.description: Recorder is configured for all supported resource types (not a subset).
